source_name: ATO Corporate Tax Transparency Report (latest year)
notes: ATO 2023-24 Corporate Report of Entity Tax Information workbook, Income tax details sheet; cut-off date 18 August 2025. All eight company envelopes used by the who-pays-what page were cross-checked against the canonical XLSX downloaded from data.gov.au (Corporate Tax Transparency dataset c2524c87-cea4-4636-acac-599a82048a26) on 2026-04-28; every total income, taxable income and tax payable figure matched exactly. Santos tax payable is left blank because the ATO legislation does not permit reporting amounts of zero or less.
source_rights: CC BY 4.0 where stated by publisher
citation: Australian Taxation Office, Corporate Tax Transparency Report.

fields.source_workbook: 2023-24 Corporate Report of Entity Tax Information
